content: agent1: implementing dry_run option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image.py. Will not touch other files.

agent1: pushed dry_run to branch agent1 (commit 309325d0a). Merging your backup/backup_suffix now — note I changed 'if open_fp:' to 'elif open_fp:' around line 2570 to add a dry_run branch before it, so there will be a small conflict there. I'll resolve it so backup logic still runs inside the real-file-open branch, and add 'or dry_run' isn't needed for backup close logic. Will report back.

agent1: resolved the second conflict (param.pop ordering) and merged your backup feature cleanly. patch.txt now has both dry_run and backup/backup_suffix. All 198 tests in test_image.py pass. Pushed to team/agent1.
